expectations.text: Contains all 10 PRD sections (Executive Summary through Open Questions)
expectations.evidence: Uses a custom structure with 9 sections: Overview, User Personas, Feature Requirements, Architecture, Cross-Team Dependencies, Rollout Plan, Risks, Open Questions, Appendix. Missing: Executive Summary (4-line What/Why/When/Win format), Business Context (commercial evidence, strategic fit), User Requirements (journey maps), Go-to-Market Requirements, Launch Plan (phased rollout with gates). The structure diverges significantly from the 10-section PRD template.

expectations.text: Success metrics include a failure threshold
expectations.evidence: Section 1.3 has a success metrics table with targets but no failure threshold. No mention of when to reconsider or change direction.

expectations.text: Uses named personas from product.local.md, not 'users' or 'a user'
expectations.evidence: Uses generic persona types: 'Operations Manager (non-technical)', 'Business Analyst (semi-technical)', 'Developer/Admin (technical)'. No named personas.

expectations.text: Functional requirements use MoSCoW prioritisation with no more than 60% MUST
expectations.evidence: Uses P0/P1/P2 prioritization scheme instead of MoSCoW (MUST/SHOULD/COULD). No analysis of MUST percentage.

expectations.text: Technical architecture notes section is present
expectations.evidence: Section 4 'Architecture Considerations' covers execution model, data model, security/access control, and limits/quotas.

expectations.text: PRD status is marked as DRAFT
Go-to-market section addresses documentation, CS enablement, and sales enablement
expectations.evidence: No Go-to-Market section exists. No mention of documentation plans, CS enablement, or sales enablement.

expectations.text: Non-functional requirements include performance targets with specific numbers
expectations.evidence: Mentioned in Success Metrics table and Architecture section: '99.5% successful execution rate', 'Median < 10 minutes', '15% improvement in 90-day retention'. Limits table has specific numbers: '50 steps per workflow', '5 minutes max step timeout', '1 hour max workflow timeout'.
